The YouTube video has been embedded on the landing page. I added it below the "Evaluate every component of your voice agent..." paragraph with:

- A responsive 16:9 aspect ratio container using the padding-bottom technique
- Rounded corners and shadow for a polished look
- Proper spacing (`mt-8 md:mt-12`) to separate it from the text above
- Full accessibility attributes (`title`, `allow`, `allowFullScreen`)
